name: San Francisco Main Library
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: San Francisco Public Library Post Occupancy Evaluation
documents.creator: Ripley, Cynthia,Mason, Florence, librarian,Kent, Susan,Ripley Architects
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2000 post-occupancy evaluation of the completed Main Library documents facility conditions, proposed changes and remaining construction close-out items.

documents.title: San Francisco Main Library : draft environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1991 draft environmental impact report assesses the New Main Library project on Marshall Square.

documents.title: [Release]
documents.creator: San Francisco Public Library
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1991 press release records the Library Commission's approval of design-development drawings for the new Main Library, designed by Cathy Simon of Simon Martin-Vegue Winkelstein & Moris and James Ingo Freed.

documents.title: The San Francisco main public library : an assessment of the existing facility and its ability to meet future library needs
documents.creator: Randall Rice and Joseph Becker,with Hellmuth, Obata, and Kassabaum
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A facility assessment weighs renovation against new construction and recommends building a new Main Library on Marshall Square to meet future needs.
